Schedule Meet & Greet
Sign Up Patient Portal Login

Become a Patient at Forward Family Medicine

Hero

Your first step costs nothing — just a conversation.

Before you commit to anything, we invite you to a free, no-obligation Meet & Greet with Dr. [Name]. Ask every question you have, see the practice, and decide — on your timeline, with no pressure — whether Forward Family Medicine is the right fit for you and your family.

Schedule Your Free Meet & Greet →

How to Get Started

Step 1 — Schedule a Free Meet & Greet {#schedule}

A 20-minute conversation — in person or via video — with Dr. [Name]. This is your chance to:

  • Ask anything about the practice, the DPC model, and what membership includes
  • Share your health history and current concerns to see if we’re a good fit
  • Tour the practice if you’re coming in person
  • Meet the team and get a feel for the culture

No paperwork. No commitment. Just a conversation.

Scheduling widget placeholder: [EMBED: Calendly or practice scheduling widget]

Or contact us directly:

  • Phone: [phone number placeholder]
  • Email: [email placeholder]
  • Office hours: [hours placeholder]

Step 2 — Enroll Online

If you decide to become a member, enrollment is simple and takes about 10 minutes online.

  1. Complete the enrollment form (personal information, health history, insurance details for reference)
  2. Set up your monthly membership billing (ACH bank transfer or credit card)
  3. Sign the membership agreement — a plain-language document explaining exactly what’s included

Enrollment form link placeholder: [LINK: Patient enrollment portal]

Step 3 — Your First Comprehensive Visit

Once enrolled, we schedule your onboarding visit — a 60-minute appointment where we:

  • Review your full health history in depth
  • Discuss your health goals and any active concerns
  • Order any overdue labs or screenings
  • Build your personalized care plan, including lifestyle medicine components
  • Set up your direct access to Dr. [Name]

This is the most thorough first appointment most patients have experienced. Come with questions — we have time for all of them.

Step 4 — You’re a Member

From day one of membership, you have direct access to Dr. [Name] by phone, text, and secure message. Same-day and next-day appointments are available. Your care has begun.

Membership Plans at a Glance

PlanWho It’s ForMonthly Fee
Individual AdultAges 18–64$[X]/month
Senior AdultAges 65+$[X]/month
ChildAges 0–17 (with parent member)$[X]/month
Family2 adults + up to 3 children$[X]/month
Employer Group5+ employeesContact us

One-time enrollment fee applies. Annual commitment or month-to-month options available.

See full membership details →

What to Expect at Your Meet & Greet

The Meet & Greet is informal and unhurried. Dr. [Name] will ask about your current health situation and what brings you in, and you’ll have time to ask about:

  • How to transition from your current doctor
  • What a typical year of membership looks like
  • Whether your specific conditions and concerns fall within our scope
  • How labs and medications are priced
  • Anything else on your mind

There is no obligation at any point in the process. If you decide it’s not the right fit, we’ll part warmly and wish you well.

Transitioning from Another Doctor

We make transitions easy:

  • We request records from your previous provider on your behalf
  • Ongoing prescriptions are reviewed and continued (where appropriate) from your first visit
  • Specialist relationships are maintained — we work with your existing specialists, not against them
  • We coordinate any outstanding referrals or care gaps from prior to enrollment

Most patients find the transition takes one or two weeks from enrollment to first visit, depending on how quickly records are available.

Serving Wayne, PA and the Main Line

Image placeholder: /src/assets/local/wayne-pa-main-line.jpg Alt text: Walkable downtown Wayne, PA — Philadelphia Main Line community

Wayne, Pennsylvania is a vibrant Philadelphia Main Line community known for its walkable downtown, excellent schools, and family-friendly neighborhoods. Many residents choose personalized primary care that prioritizes prevention, longer visits, and strong doctor–patient relationships — which is the focus of Forward Family Medicine.

We serve Wayne, Berwyn, Devon, Malvern, Paoli, Radnor, Villanova, Newtown Square, and surrounding communities.

  • Saturday: [hours or “Closed”]
  • After-hours urgent access: available to members

For Employers {#employer}

Looking to offer DPC as a health benefit for your team? Forward Family Medicine works with small and mid-size businesses to provide membership-based primary care as an employee benefit.

Benefits for employers:

  • Predictable, transparent per-employee monthly cost
  • Reduced sick days and urgent care visits
  • Healthier, more satisfied employees
  • Alternative or supplement to traditional group health insurance

Contact us to discuss group rates →

Contact Us {#contact}

Have a question that isn’t answered here? We’re happy to help.

  • Phone: [phone number placeholder]
  • Email: [email placeholder]
  • Secure message: [portal link placeholder]
  • Mailing address: [address placeholder]

Frequently Asked Questions

Is the Meet & Greet really free? Yes, completely. There is no fee and no obligation. It is simply a conversation to help you decide if Forward Family Medicine is right for you.

What if I’m not ready to schedule — can I just get more information? Of course. Browse our FAQ → or call or email us directly with any questions.

How long until I can get my first real appointment after enrolling? Most members have their onboarding visit within one to two weeks of enrollment. If you have an urgent concern before your first visit, contact us and we’ll see you sooner.

Can I enroll my whole family at once? Yes. Family plans are available and recommended — having one physician who knows every family member’s history is one of the great benefits of a DPC practice.

What if I decide to leave the practice? Month-to-month members can cancel with 30 days’ written notice. Annual members may be subject to the terms of their agreement. We do not make it difficult to leave — but we do work hard to make sure you never want to.

Take the First Step Today

Schedule Your Free Meet & Greet → No paperwork. No pressure. Just a conversation about better primary care.

FFM Forward Family Medicine

The Main Line's only Direct Primary Care practice with in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine.

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
